sections.paragraph:
Original: הנע

Transliteration: hêna‛

Phonetic: hay-nah'

BDB Definition:

Hena = "troubling"
  1. a city in Mesopotamia which the Assyrian kings reduced shortly before the time of Sennacherib; site unknown

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine Location
